arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk makes feelings clear as Liverpool struggles laid bare despite win
arts.sum: Liverpool had to battle to their win over Wolves at Anfield with the visitors dominating the second-half - so much so that the Reds failed to have a single effort on goal in the final 45 minutes.

arts.ttl: Pereira slams red card decision as Wolves lose at Liverpool
arts.sum: Vitor Pereira has slammed the decision not to send off Ibrahima Konate during Wolves’ 2-1 defeat at Liverpool on Sunday. Wolves were beaten by the Premier League leaders at Anfield, as first-half goals from Luis Diaz and Mohamed Salah earned Liverpool three points. The visitors grew into the game after the break and pulled a […] The post Pereira slams red card decision as Wolves lose at Liverpool first appeared on The Football Faithful.

That goal gave Wolves belief and both Gomes and Munetsi had half chances, while with one minute left Cunha and Tommy Doyle combined, but Munetsi couldn’t scramble the ball home at the back end. Wolves left Liverpool empty handed on Sunday but will take heart from a battling second half performance – and brilliant Matheus Cunha strike – which pushed the league leaders all the way.

arts.ttl: Liverpool 2-1 Wolves: Arne Slot's side suffer unwanted club Premier League first in Anfield win
arts.sum: Liverpool suffer an unwanted club first in their unconvincing 2-1 Premier League win over Wolverhampton Wanderers at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Liverpool 2-1 Wolves: Match report & 3 talking points from tense Anfield duel
arts.sum: Full analysis and talking points from Liverpool's 2-1 win over Wolves in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Van Dijk admits ‘sloppy’ Liverpool fortunate in Wolves win
arts.sum: Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk has said his side were ‘sloppy’ during the club’s 2-1 win over Wolves at Anfield. Liverpool extended their lead in the Premier League title race to seven points with a win on Merseyside on Sunday. Luis Diaz bundled the Reds in front after 15 minutes, before the Colombian won a […] The post Van Dijk admits ‘sloppy’ Liverpool fortunate in Wolves win first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Liverpool restore seven-point lead with hard-fought win over Wolves
arts.sum: The second half started with chances for both teams, with Marshall Munetsi drawing a one-v-one save from Alisson after being introduced for his Premier League debut, before the offside flag denied Salah a second at the other end. Liverpool responded to their midweek draw with Everton by beating Wolverhampton Wanderers 2-1 to restore their seven-point lead at the top of the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah on spot as Liverpool hold off Wolves fightback to reopen gap
arts.sum: A rare troubled week for Arne Slot ended in the release of victory and the restoration of Liverpool’s seven-point lead at the top of the Premier League, yet concern lingers. The league leaders were given a serious fright by Wolves and there were nerves throughout the Liverpool team, and crowd, as a struggling opponent was kept at bay. A big week beckons. Liverpool looked in a commanding position after Luis Díaz and Mohamed Salah, with his 28th goal of the season, had established a two-goal interval lead. But Matheus Cunha’s fine consolation sparked a nervous finale. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Liverpool plot summer move for ‘technically excellent’ €65m-rated Frenchman
arts.sum: Liverpool have been linked with a move for the Paris Saint-Germain midfielder Warren Zaire-Emery. The 18-year-old midfielder has attracted a lot of interest from top European clubs with his performances in the French league and Liverpool are keen on securing his signature. According to a report from AnfieldWatch, the player is valued at €65 million, […] The post Liverpool plot summer move for ‘technically excellent’ €65m-rated Frenchman appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Luis Diaz stat after win vs Wolves shows why Liverpool need him more now than ever
arts.sum: Liverpool held out at Anfield for a somewhat nervy 2-1 win after Luis Diaz scored the opening goal before winning the penalty for Mohamed Salah to grab the hosts' second prior to Matheus Cunha's strike
